heading: Application of equitable principles in inter partes proceedings
label: 1069 Application of equitable principles in inter partes proceedings
text: In all inter partes proceedings equitable principles of laches, estoppel, and acquiescence, where applicable may be considered and applied.
notes: Amendments1988— struck out at end “The provisions of this section shall also govern proceedings heretofore begun in the Patent and Trademark Office and not finally determined.”Pub. L. 100–6671975— substituted “Patent and Trademark Office” for “Patent Office”.Pub. L. 93–596

Repeal and Effect on Existing RightsRepeal of inconsistent provisions, effect of this chapter on pending proceedings and existing registrations and rights under prior acts, see notes set out under .section 1051 of this title
